race.comment: NIGHT AGENT (11) exciting gelding expected to go quickly through the grades. Had no luck in the Inglis Sprint two-back, then scored with ridiculous ease by 10 lengths over 1350m at Beaumont (Newcastle). Will have little trouble running this trip from the low draw. The one to beat. STRAWBERRY IMPACT (3) tough ask first-up when he charged late to finish a close-up third over 1400m at Kembla Grange in the Provincial Mid Champs. Has come back in good order and look for him launching late. BELLA KHADIJAH (5) no excuses today fourth-up after charging late when fourth to Barrengarry over 1500m at Rosehill in Midway company. Goes well on her home track and doesn't have to improve much to figure prominently. BUBBLES UP (12) was a sharp debut winner then couldn't follow that up with a tiring fifth over 1350m at Wyong. Ready for this trip and she gets a much better set-up for this.
